citation: 7 CFR Part 3555 + USDA SFH GLP — default 1-4-person income limit
comment: Hand-calc: household_income = $119,850 (exactly equal to default 1-4-person limit), household_size=4, county=Autauga AL (NOT in by_county list -> silent fallback to default per D-PHASE2-Q5). 119850 <= 119850 -> income_eligible=True. Guarantee fees: $200,000 * 0.0100 = $2,000.00 upfront; $200,000 * 0.0035 = $700.00 annual.
